name: TestWaitForLinETFSingleResponse
title: TestWaitForLinETFSingleResponse
syntax: long TestWaitForLinETFSingleResponse (dword aETFFrameId, dword aAssocFrameId, dword aTimeout);
description: Waits for the occurrence of a LIN Event-triggered frame with a single response for the specified associated frame. Should the event-triggered frame not occur before the expiration of the specified timeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aETFFrameId
parameters.description: Frame identifier of LIN event-triggered frame to be awaited.
